requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — UNBS PVoC Pre-Export Verification and IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 as International Baseline for Uganda BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——UNBS PVoC出口前核查及IEC 62619 / IEC 62133作为乌干达BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——UNBS PVoC出口前核查及IEC 62619 / IEC 62133作為烏干達BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: The Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) administers the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) scheme for regulated products imported into Uganda. Under the PVoC scheme, regulated goods must obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from a UNBS-appointed inspection body (including Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek, and COTECNA operating in China and other export countries) before shipment; goods arriving without a valid CoC are subject to detention, re-inspection, and potential rejection at Uganda customs. UNBS publishes a regulated products list; importers and exporters must verify whether BESS cells, modules, or complete systems are listed. UNBS requires conformity evidence against applicable international standards — IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications, where applicable to cells used in BESS modules) are the internationally expected safety baselines for lithium BESS cells and modules. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based energy storage systems) applies at the system level. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted by UNBS PVoC as substitutes for IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 evidence. Additionally, ERA and project owners for utility-scale and C&I BESS projects in Uganda reference IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 compliance as technical prerequisites for project acceptance.
summary.zh: 乌干达国家标准局（UNBS）负责管理进入乌干达的受监管产品的出口前合格核查（PVoC）方案。根据PVoC方案，受监管商品须在出货前从UNBS指定检验机构（包括在中国及其他出口国运营的Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek和COTECNA）取得合格证书（CoC）；未持有效CoC到达的商品将在乌干达海关被扣押、重新检验，并可能遭到拒绝入境。UNBS公布受监管产品清单；进口商和出口商须核实BESS电芯、模组或完整系统是否列入清单。UNBS要求提供符合适用国际标准的合格证据——IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）及IEC 62133（便携式应用密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求，适用于BESS模组中使用的电芯时）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）适用于系统级。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被UNBS PVoC接受为IEC 62619或IEC 62133证据的替代依据。此外，乌干达公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目的ERA和项目业主将IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2合规作为项目验收的技术前提。
summary.zht: 烏干達國家標準局（UNBS）負責管理進入烏干達的受監管產品的出口前合格核查（PVoC）方案。根據PVoC方案，受監管商品須在出貨前從UNBS指定檢驗機構（包括在中國及其他出口國運營的Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek和COTECNA）取得合格證書（CoC）；未持有效CoC到達的商品將在烏干達海關被扣押、重新檢驗，並可能遭到拒絕入境。UNBS公布受監管產品清單；進口商和出口商須核實BESS電芯、模組或完整系統是否列入清單。UNBS要求提供符合適用國際標準的合格證據——IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）及IEC 62133（便攜式應用密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求，適用於BESS模組中使用的電芯時）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）適用於系統級。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被UNBS PVoC接受為IEC 62619或IEC 62133證據的替代依據。此外，烏干達公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目的ERA和項目業主將IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2合規作為項目驗收的技術前提。

standards_or_laws: UNBS PVoC Scheme — Uganda National Bureau of Standards Pre-Export Verification of Conformity — Certificate of Conformity required before shipment for regulated products (verify current regulated product list at unbs.go.ug)

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Uganda project specifications and UNBS PVoC assessment)

IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications (applicable to certain BESS module cell formats where referenced by UNBS PVoC)

IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard referenced in ERA licensing conditions and project specifications)
UNBS — Uganda National Bureau of Standards (unbs.go.ug — verify current regulated product list and PVoC procedures directly)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted by UNBS PVoC as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 62133, and are not accepted as substitutes in Uganda project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, and must engage a UNBS-appointed inspection body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek, or COTECNA) operating in China to obtain the CoC before shipment.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被UNBS PVoC接受为IEC 62619或IEC 62133的等效依据，也不被乌干达项目规格接受为替代依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并须在中国境内聘请UNBS指定检验机构（Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek或COTECNA）在出货前取得CoC。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被UNBS PVoC接受為IEC 62619或IEC 62133的等效依據，也不被烏干達項目規格接受為替代依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並須在中國境內聘請UNBS指定檢驗機構（Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek或COTECNA）在出貨前取得CoC。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: The UNBS PVoC scheme is a mandatory pre-shipment gate — BESS cells, modules, or complete systems that are on the UNBS regulated products list cannot be imported into Uganda without a valid Certificate of Conformity from a UNBS-appointed inspection body. The CoC requires conformity evidence against applicable international standards (IEC 62619 and/or IEC 62133), not Chinese GB standards. Additionally, ERA and Uganda project owners reference IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and systems. Exporters should: (a) verify the current UNBS regulated products list (unbs.go.ug) to determine whether the specific BESS cell, module, or system type is listed and confirm the applicable CoC procedure; (b) engage a UNBS-appointed inspection body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek, or COTECNA) operating in China at the earliest stage to understand CoC requirements, applicable standards, and lead times before the shipping schedule is committed; (c) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Uganda BESS projects; (d) confirm the applicable IEC standard edition and test scope required by the UNBS-appointed inspection body and the project specification before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：UNBS PVoC方案是强制性装运前门槛——列入UNBS受监管产品清单的BESS电芯、模组或完整系统，未持UNBS指定检验机构出具的有效合格证书不得进口至乌干达。CoC要求提供符合适用国际标准（IEC 62619和/或IEC 62133）的合格证据，而非中国GB标准。此外，ERA和乌干达项目业主将IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2作为BESS电芯和系统的预期安全证据。出口商应：（a）核实现行UNBS受监管产品清单（unbs.go.ug），确认特定BESS电芯、模组或系统类型是否列入并确认适用的CoC程序；（b）尽早在中国境内聘请UNBS指定检验机构（Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek或COTECNA），在确定运输计划前了解CoC要求、适用标准和交付周期；（c）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至乌干达BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（d）在启动测试计划前，向UNBS指定检验机构和项目规格确认适用IEC标准版本和测试范围。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：UNBS PVoC方案是強制性裝運前門檻——列入UNBS受監管產品清單的BESS電芯、模組或完整系統，未持UNBS指定檢驗機構出具的有效合格證書不得進口至烏干達。CoC要求提供符合適用國際標準（IEC 62619和/或IEC 62133）的合格證據，而非中國GB標準。此外，ERA和烏干達項目業主將IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2作為BESS電芯和系統的預期安全證據。出口商應：（a）核實現行UNBS受監管產品清單（unbs.go.ug），確認特定BESS電芯、模組或系統類型是否列入並確認適用的CoC程序；（b）儘早在中國境內聘請UNBS指定檢驗機構（Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek或COTECNA），在確定運輸計劃前了解CoC要求、適用標準和交付週期；（c）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至烏干達BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（d）在啟動測試計畫前，向UNBS指定檢驗機構和項目規格確認適用IEC標準版本和測試範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UNBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity required before shipment for regulated products (verify current regulated product list at unbs.go.ug); IEC 62619 compliance mandatory in project practice where ERA or project-owner specifications require it
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as substitute for IEC 62619 under UNBS PVoC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UNBS PVoC pre-export verification is a mandatory shipment gate for regulated products imported into Uganda — BESS cells, modules, or systems on the regulated products list require a Certificate of Conformity from a UNBS-appointed inspection body before shipment; Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 evidence under the PVoC scheme. Additionally, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 are the internationally expected safety baselines for Uganda project acceptance and ERA technical review. Verify the current UNBS regulated products list and engage a UNBS-appointed inspection body in China well before the intended shipment date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UNBS PVoC出口前核查是进口至乌干达的受监管产品的强制性出货门槛——受监管产品清单中的BESS电芯、模组或系统须在出货前从UNBS指定检验机构取得合格证书；在PVoC方案下，中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受为IEC 62619或IEC 62133证据的替代依据。此外，IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2是乌干达项目验收和ERA技术审查的国际预期安全基准。请在预定出货日期前充分核实现行UNBS受监管产品清单，并在中国境内聘请UNBS指定检验机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UNBS PVoC出口前核查是進口至烏干達的受監管產品的強制性出貨門檻——受監管產品清單中的BESS電芯、模組或系統須在出貨前從UNBS指定檢驗機構取得合格證書；在PVoC方案下，中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被接受為IEC 62619或IEC 62133證據的替代依據。此外，IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2是烏干達項目驗收和ERA技術審查的國際預期安全基準。請在預定出貨日期前充分核實現行UNBS受監管產品清單，並在中國境內聘請UNBS指定檢驗機構。
